answer:
The patriotic anthem is "Hindustani Bachon Ka Qaumi Geet" ("National Anthem for Hindustani Children"), the single country named being Hindustan (India). It appears in chapter 26 of *Bang-E-Dara Part 1* by Allama Iqbal.[^1]

**Opening quatrain:**

> Where Chishti first Truth's holy call conveyed,[^2]  
> And Nanak's song of Oneness was displayed,  
> The land the Tatars for their homeland made,  
> Which drew Hijaz's sons from desert shade,[^2]

**Closing quatrain:**

> Its people Moses, and its peaks are Sinai's height,[^3]  
> Where Prophet Noah's ark first saw the light,[^3]  
> Whose very ground is a stair to heaven's light,  
> To live here is a paradise of pure delight,[^3]

[^1]: Allama Iqbal, *Bang-E-Dara Part 1*, [chapter](/works/allama-iqbal-bang-e-dara-part-1-55b25c/26-hindustani-bachon-ka-qaumi-geet/translation/).

[^2]: Allama Iqbal, *Bang-E-Dara Part 1*, [paragraph](/works/allama-iqbal-bang-e-dara-part-1-55b25c/26-hindustani-bachon-ka-qaumi-geet/translation/#p-da6786).

[^3]: Allama Iqbal, *Bang-E-Dara Part 1*, [paragraph](/works/allama-iqbal-bang-e-dara-part-1-55b25c/26-hindustani-bachon-ka-qaumi-geet/translation/#p-a9f72d).
